## Quotation candidates (auto excerpt)

**civ-02 (excerpt):** - **Continuity from #1:** Review of **Göbekli Tepe**, **Jericho**, **Çatalhöyük** — scholarly lean that **religion** drove the move toward agriculture; today’s claim: the **religious impulse** was always present; **religion** is part of what makes us human. - **Ice Age cave art (e.g. ~30–34k years):** Chauvet, Lascaux, Altamira — **ochre/charcoal**, fat lamps; paintings in **best acoustic** zones …
